Apple called and said the amount I paid for the iPhone was too little as it did not include the VAT. Please send them the difference of an additional 19.5% of the amount we paid + a fee of 5.29.

I'll help you send the additional amount to Apple for the VAT and fee. First, I need to get your current account information and recent transactions to understand what you originally paid for the iPhone.

Let me start by getting your account balance and recent transactions:
